posts.content: Knives Out goes live on Twitter to drive conversation on its first anniversary
KATY PERRY on X: "A Legendary playlist - stream The Ones That Got The Plays now 🩷 https://t.co/w7pLbQvjRy https://t.co/hgO5A0nu5o" / X | Ghostarchive

Sony Music South India on X: "VibeVaasey’vin adaavadi pookatum 🌸🩷 The much awaited #LIK album drops at 7️⃣PM today! 💕 #LIKFromApril10 An @anirudhofficial musical #LIKFromApril10 @anirudhofficial @VigneshShivN @pradeeponelife @IamKrithiShetty @iam_SJSuryah @Rowdy_Pictures @7screenstudio https://t.co/dMl1Pcop5A" / X | Ghostarchive

Prince Pictures on X: "#Saanjikkava - a cute love melody from the movie #KAARI in the voice of @sidsriram is on its way and will arrive by 2moro @ 06:00 pm @SasikumarDir @parv_1998 @HemanthM_Dir @Prince_Pictures @immancomposer @lakku76 @lalithanandpoet @Kirubakaran_AKR @sarathnivash @SonyMusicSouth https://t.co/5BIqTkNntJ" / X | Ghostarchive
